subject: docs(todo): add theme UI reference to existing burger menu TODOs
body:
canva-grid, budgy-ting, repo-tor, and few-lap have partial burger
menus being upgraded but were missing the Theme UI in Burger Menu
spec reference. Added theme UI verification/implementation step to
each burger menu section.
